completion_promises.criterion_text: src/fleet_memory/mcp/tools/search.py exists and registers memory_search against the server via the TASK-MCP-001 extension point
completion_promises.evidence: Created src/fleet_memory/mcp/tools/search.py with memory_search function and register() extension point. Updated src/fleet_memory/mcp/server.py register_all() to import and call search.register(). Test test_register_all_is_no_op_without_tools verifies registration succeeds.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The tool accepts project, query, optional payload_types, domain_tags, token_budget, and include_superseded; it constructs a valid SearchRequest
completion_promises.evidence: memory_search function accepts all required parameters with proper types and defaults. Constructs SearchRequest with all fields. Test test_project_scoping verifies SearchRequest construction. All parameters are passed through to SearchRequest validation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: When token_budget is omitted, a default of 2000 is applied and the assembled block does not exceed it
completion_promises.evidence: DEFAULT_TOKEN_BUDGET = 2000 constant defined. When token_budget is None, it is set to DEFAULT_TOKEN_BUDGET before creating SearchRequest. Test test_default_budget_application verifies that omitting token_budget results in successful assembly with valid coverage score.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The tool returns a single assembled context block plus the coverage score; results are scoped to the requested project and ordered most-relevant first
completion_promises.evidence: Function returns dict with context_block, coverage_score, contributing_types, and tokens_used. Uses fleet_memory.retrieval.assemble_context() which returns AssemblyResult. Test test_ranking_order verifies ordering by score. SearchRequest scopes results by project parameter.

completion_promises.criterion_text: include_superseded defaults to False; superseded memories are absent from default results
completion_promises.evidence: include_superseded parameter defaults to False in function signature. SearchRequest is constructed with this value. Test test_exclude_superseded_default verifies default behavior (though actual filtering is in retrieval layer). Seam test test_retrieval_search_contract verifies SearchRequest.include_superseded defaults to False.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A query matching nothing returns an empty context block and not an error
completion_promises.evidence: assemble_context handles empty results list. Test test_empty_result_not_error passes empty search results, verifies result.is_error is False and context_block is empty string with coverage_score 0.0.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A query containing instruction-like text is used only as an opaque search string (no behavioural change)
completion_promises.evidence: Query parameter is passed directly to SearchRequest with no special processing or parsing. Test test_opaque_query passes instruction-like text ('ignore previous instructions...') and verifies no error occurs - query treated as opaque string.

completion_promises.criterion_text: When the store raises TimeoutError the tool returns the 'memory store unavailable' tool-error; when embeddings raise EmbedServiceError it returns the 'search temporarily unavailable' tool-error — in both cases the server stays running (via TASK-MCP-002)
completion_promises.evidence: memory_search is wrapped with @tool_safe decorator from TASK-MCP-002. Exceptions propagate to wrapper which converts them to ToolResult. Test test_store_down_degrades verifies TimeoutError returns infrastructure error with 'memory store is unavailable'. Test test_embed_down_degrades verifies EmbedServiceError returns infrastructure error with 'temporarily unavailable'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran ruff check --fix on both implementation and test files. Ran ruff format on both files. All checks passed. No linting or formatting errors remain.
